= rpk cluster maintenance
:description: Manage cluster maintenance mode for performing rolling upgrades and other maintenance operations.
:page-platforms: linux,darwin

// This content is autogenerated. Do not edit manually. To customize content, see the writer's guide: https://github.com/redpanda-data/docs/blob/main/docs-data/RPK_OVERRIDES_GUIDE.adoc

// tag::single-source[]
Manage cluster maintenance mode for performing rolling upgrades and other maintenance operations.

== Usage

[,bash]
----
rpk cluster maintenance [flags]
----




== Subcommands

[cols="1,2a"]
|===
|Command |Description

|xref:reference:rpk/rpk-cluster/rpk-cluster-maintenance-disable.adoc[`rpk cluster maintenance disable`]
|Disable maintenance mode on a broker, allowing it to resume normal operations and accept partition assignments.

|xref:reference:rpk/rpk-cluster/rpk-cluster-maintenance-enable.adoc[`rpk cluster maintenance enable`]
|Enable maintenance mode on a broker. While in maintenance mode, the broker drains partition leadership to other brokers.

|xref:reference:rpk/rpk-cluster/rpk-cluster-maintenance-status.adoc[`rpk cluster maintenance status`]
|Report maintenance status. This command reports maintenance status for each node in the cluster.

|===


== Global flags

[cols="1m,1a,2a"]
|===
|Value |Type |Description

|--config |string |Redpanda or `rpk` config file; default search paths are `/root/.config/rpk/rpk.yaml`, `$PWD/redpanda.yaml`, and `/etc/redpanda/redpanda.yaml`.
|-X, --config-opt |stringArray |Override `rpk` configuration settings; `-X help` for detail or `-X list` for terser detail.
|--ignore-profile |bool |Ignore `rpk.yaml` and `redpanda.yaml`; use default settings.
|--profile |string |`rpk` profile to use.
|-v, --verbose |bool |Enable verbose logging.
|===

// end::single-source[]
